signals.summary: 94 passed, 0 failed (baseline 66 + 28 new: test_enemy_ai 15, test_incinedile 13); python3 scripts/validate_seeds.py exit 0 (170 rows)

stages.content: Read review-3, DIRECTION, addendum R0-R19, enemies.json, full sim engine + tests + validate_seeds. Baseline verified: 66/66 green in worktree.

AI enters the log via an ai_decide command handled INSIDE the sim (EnemyAI RefCounted member, serialized); driver issues one per ready enemy per tick (sim.ai_ready_ids / GameController.run_enemy_turn). Policy is rng-free priorities; the ONLY ai_rng consumer is the dodge-threshold d6 (salted stream, mirror of hype goal_rng). Dodge: per aimed weapon round, roll>=threshold negates; no dodge while Exposed/Helpless. Phase machine v1: phase 1 + transition beat to phase 2 (breach reset), phases 3-6 + explosion choreography deferred.

simulation/enemy_ai.gd (EnemyAI: mob/elite/boss policies, dodge threshold, phase machine, serialization) + CombatSim ai_decide/_ai_summon/ai_ready_ids/_breach_and_phase_checks + resolver dodge hook & heal-on-resolution + CombatantState abilities/boss_phases + GameController run_enemy_turn + seeds (dodge_threshold, dash range, hp_at_or_below) + validator coverage + R11 #15-#18. Found+fixed latent engine bug: burst-damage breach could never fire on scheduled resolutions (_advance_tick reset damage_taken_this_tick before _post checked breach).

Built and committed. 94/94 green (real run), seeds validator green. R11 #15-#18 added. Deferred: explosion choreography + phases 3-6, death_spin/drag_back, cone/line geometry, Dash reflexes-counters, pack synergy, AI stances.
